name: @borjie/customer-geo-routing
description: Customer Geographic Routing + Scope-Login Selector (Wave 18Z). Routes a customer to the nearest org_unit whose service_area includes them (polygon | postal codes | station radius | administrative codes), with audit-chained override paths. Builds session_scopes rows from a user's multi-binding scope set and produces the contract for the login-time scope picker + mid-session switcher. Implements Docs/DESIGN/CUSTOMER_GEO_ROUTING_AND_SCOPE_LOGIN.md.
